title: Saeima will ponder questions of ethics during Tuesday conference
summary_full: On Tuesday, April 21st, Latvia's parliament, the Saeima, will turn a touch Aristotelian and host a conference titled “Ethics in Modern Parliamentarism”, where legislators, representatives of academia and civil society, as well as foreign experts, will discuss the challenges of parliamentary ethics in modern democracy, paying special attention to the experience of the Baltic States.
